message:
Complete 9-provider verification harness: add Anthropic + Gemini smoke tests

Add Anthropic and Gemini smoke modules to provider_native_verify.rs, achieving
full coverage across all 9 provider implementations:

- anthropic_smoke: Anthropic-native SSE (message_start/content_block_delta/
  message_delta/message_stop), tool_use blocks with input_json_delta
- gemini_smoke: Gemini SSE (candidates[].content.parts), functionCall for
  tools, URL-embedded API key matching VCR playback key

Total: 143 tests across 9 providers (Anthropic, Gemini, Vertex, Bedrock,
Copilot, GitLab, OpenAI, Azure, Cohere). All passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -0,0 +1,39 @@
+{
+  "version": "1.0",
+  "test_name": "verify_anthropic_error_auth_401",
+  "recorded_at": "2026-02-10T17:40:23.621Z",
+  "interactions": [
+    {
+      "request": {
+        "method": "POST",
+        "url": "https://api.anthropic.com/v1/messages",
+        "headers": [
+          [
+            "Content-Type",
+            "application/json"
+          ],
+          [
+            "X-API-Key",
+            "[REDACTED]"
+          ],
+          [
+            "anthropic-version",
+            "2023-06-01"
+          ]
+        ]
+      },
+      "response": {
+        "status": 401,
+        "headers": [
+          [
+            "Content-Type",
+            "application/json"
+          ]
+        ],
+        "body_chunks": [
+          "{\"error\":{\"message\":\"Simulated error 401\",\"type\":\"authentication_error\"},\"type\":\"error\"}"
+        ]
+      }
+    }
+  ]
+}
\ No newline at end of file

+          "event: message_start\ndata: {\"message\":{\"content\":[],\"id\":\"msg_verify_001\",\"model\":\"claude-sonnet-4-20250514\",\"role\":\"assistant\",\"stop_reason\":null,\"stop_sequence\":null,\"type\":\"message\",\"usage\":{\"input_tokens\":20,\"output_tokens\":1}},\"type\":\"message_start\"}\n\n",
+          "event: content_block_start\ndata: {\"content_block\":{\"text\":\"\",\"type\":\"text\"},\"index\":0,\"type\":\"content_block_start\"}\n\n",
+          "event: content_block_delta\ndata: {\"delta\":{\"text\":\"Hello from the verification harness.\",\"type\":\"text_delta\"},\"index\":0,\"type\":\"content_block_delta\"}\n\n",
+          "event: content_block_stop\ndata: {\"index\":0,\"type\":\"content_block_stop\"}\n\n",
+          "event: message_delta\ndata: {\"delta\":{\"stop_reason\":\"end_turn\",\"stop_sequence\":null},\"type\":\"message_delta\",\"usage\":{\"output_tokens\":10}}\n\n",
+          "event: message_stop\ndata: {\"type\":\"message_stop\"}\n\n"
+        ]
+      }
+    }
+  ]
+}
